_meta.author: kokonutd
_meta.title: Numeric Input
_meta.description:
A customizable numeric input component with increment/decrement buttons and a visual progress indicator.

Features

- Input Controls
  - Increment/decrement buttons
  - Min/max value constraints 
  - Custom step size
  - Default value support

- Visual Feedback
  - Progress bar indicator
  - Focus states
  - Min/max labels
  - Dark mode support
